message:
test(base91): expand from 23 to 43 tests for base91 encoding/decoding (wa-2xwi4)

Add 20 new tests: encoding determinism, byte-at-a-time streaming
encode/decode, ENCTAB/DECTAB consistency (uniqueness, ASCII-only,
inverse mapping), decode of non-alphabet chars, specific data patterns
(alternating, ascending, descending, repeated), larger data roundtrips
(1KB, 10KB), zero-block efficiency, flush state reset, decoder flush
state, encoded output printable-ASCII-only, and printable ASCII
roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
